PE F499.notes: Advanced target setting feature + flash save fix.

versions.notes: Advanced target setting feature + flash save fix.
Beta: advanced target setting (auto-adjust an in-game setting to a target value via assignable increase/decrease inputs and a trigger button).
Fixes phantom button presses when position rotaries + multi-links exceed the 128-button report.
